response.justification: While Bogdan has extensive software engineering experience and strong full-stack web capabilities, he lacks the recent, deep C++ expertise required for this role. Furthermore, he has no background in industrial automation, IoT protocols (MQTT, Modbus, OPC UA), or the specific cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) central to the position.
strengths: Extensive overall software development experience with strong adherence to Agile practices, TDD, and CI/CD.
Demonstrated leadership and mentorship skills through organizing workshops, refactoring dojos, and founding an open-source platform.
Possesses some of the advantageous skills listed in the job description, specifically strong familiarity with Node.js and React.
concerns: Severe lack of recent C++ and STL experience, with the only professional C++ role occurring for a brief period in 2008.
No demonstrated experience with industrial automation, IoT environments, or related protocols like MQTT, Modbus, or OPC UA.
Missing required industrial cybersecurity expertise, specifically Secure Development Lifecycle (SDL) and IEC 62443 standards.
